user.description: New Alchemy Innovations works with small businesses with 2 to 50 people to cut through the noise around AI.
user.name: New Alchemy Innovations

tweets.text:
If your business stops when you stop, you own a job.

Test it: take one week off and watch what breaks.

List every recurring task, score it by frequency and impact, assign an owner.

Then use AI to write SOPs, draft emails, pull reports, and run daily checks before you log in. https://t.co/FUFGheSnXg
tweets.name: New Alchemy Innovations

tweets.text: Your business probably runs on 8 to 12 different software tools. None of them were built to talk to each other. That gap is costing you more than you think.
tweets.name: New Alchemy Innovations

tweets.text:
I spent years fighting with AI tools.

Then I discovered Claude's desktop app and everything changed.

Most people use it wrong - they stick to basic chat mode.

Here's how to turn Claude into your work partner in one weekend:

Use project mode for teams and cowork for deep tasks https://t.co/Pa6SsvLNX9
tweets.name: New Alchemy Innovations

tweets.text:
Claude dropped a small business plugin with 31 built-in skills.

I tested it and ran my cash flow, inbox, calendar, and CRM from one dashboard.

If you run a business, ask yourself how many hours you lose switching between apps. https://t.co/FMISh5JsVK
tweets.name: New Alchemy Innovations

tweets.text:
Claude For Small Business is INSANE!!!!

I've built a complete breakdown of all Anthropic Small Business skills that maps every workflow, connector, and automation in under 10 minutes.

The same skill stack had 382,000 downloads on its first day.

1/ https://t.co/0r9HkCyUlH
